blurb: PUBLIC (public.io) is a London-based GovTech consultancy helping governments and startups digitally transform public services across health, defence, procurement and online safety.

publications.title: Phase One Complete: A Milestone for Thames Freeport Innovation and Impact
publications.summary: Reports completion of Phase One of PUBLIC's work with Thames Freeport, deploying AI-enabled mobile health clinics and a Health AI Mobilisation Centre across Barking, Dagenham, Havering and Thurrock.

publications.title: AI and the future of policy evaluation
publications.summary: PUBLIC article on how AI could reshape the evaluation of government policy and digital projects.

publications.title: The International State of Safety Tech 2025
publications.summary: Report commissioned by Paladin Capital Group, delivered with Perspective Economics and Prof. Mary Aiken, presenting a global analysis of the Safety Tech sector.

news.title: PUBLIC Bolsters Executive Leadership Team
news.summary: Press post announcing former Google executive Rona Harvey as COO and Ryan Shea as UK Managing Director, reporting to CEO Daniel Korski.

notes: Insights listing (web_fetch) shows blog/report/press items with day+month labels (e.g. 23/24 June, 25 March) but NO year, and individual post bodies do not expose a clean publication date. Dates set to null to avoid guessing the year. Items confirmed real via web_fetch of the post pages (Thames Freeport, GovTech Lookbook, leadership press). Could not retrieve datable per-post timestamps.
